title: BugTriaged payload
description: Emitted when a bug's triage-shape metadata changes — severity and/or tags. Only the changed fields are populated as from/to pairs; unchanged fields are absent. The payload is intentionally narrow so an agent reading the events ledger can see exactly which dimensions of triage moved without re-reading the full bug row. Resolution is a separate event (BugResolved); reopening is BugReopened.

from_severity.description: Severity before the change. null if the bug had no severity set (the default-medium had not yet been overwritten with an explicit value).

to_severity.description: Severity after the change. Must differ from from_severity when both are present (a no-op edit should not emit this event).

from_tags.description: Tags string before the change. Comma-separated lowercase-kebab, same convention as BugReported.tags.

to_tags.description: Tags string after the change. Must differ from from_tags when both are present.

anyOf.description: At least one of (severity, tags) must change; this branch covers severity changes.
At least one of (severity, tags) must change; this branch covers tag changes.
